heading: Application of coastwise laws
label: 55101 Application of coastwise laws
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)55101(a)46 App.:877 (words before last proviso)., ; , ; , , .June 5, 1920, ch. 250, § 2141 Stat. 997Apr. 16, 1936, ch. 22849 Stat. 1207Pub. L. 97–31, § 12(47)95 Stat. 157Aug. 6, 198155101(b)(1)48:1664., .June 14, 1934, ch. 52348 Stat. 96355101(b)(2)48:1801 note (Covenant § 503(b))., , ; , , ; , , .Pub. L. 94–241, § 190 Stat. 263Pub. L. 98–213, § 997 Stat. 1461Pub. L. 104–208, div. A, title I, § 101(d) [title I]110 Stat. 3009–196Mar. 24, 1976Dec. 8, 1983Sept. 30, 199655101(b)(3)46 App.:877 note.Proc. No. 3215, , 72 Stat. c19.Dec. 12, 195755101(b)(4)46 App.:877 (last proviso).In subsection (a), the words “apply to the United States, including” are substituted for “extend to” for clarity. The words “From and after ” and “not covered thereby on ” are omitted as obsolete. The requirement to establish adequate steamship service to the island Territories and possessions is omitted as obsolete.February 1, 1922June 5, 1920Subsection (b)(2) is based on section 503(b) of the Covenant To Establish a Commonwealth of the Northern Mariana Islands in Political Union With the United States of America ( note).48 U.S.C. 1801Subsection (b)(3) is based on Proc. No. 3215, , 72 Stat. c19, which provided that the President, “under and by virtue of the authority vested in me by the aforesaid section 21 of the Merchant Marine Act, 1920 [46 App. U.S.C. 877], do hereby declare and proclaim that the period for the establishment of an adequate shipping service for Canton Island is extended until further notice by proclamation of the President, and that the extension of the coastwise laws of the United States to Canton Island is deferred until it is declared by proclamation of the President that such adequate shipping service has been established”.Dec. 12, 1957In subsection (b)(4), the words “and fix a date for the going into effect of same” are omitted as surplus.The provisos of 46 App. U.S.C. 877 relating to the Philippine Islands are omitted as obsolete because of the independence of the Philippine Islands. See Proc. No. 2695, , ( note).July 4, 194660 Stat. 135222 U.S.C. 1394

References in TextSection 502(b) of the Covenant To Establish a Commonwealth of the Northern Mariana Islands in Political Union With the United States of America, referred to in subsec. (b)(2), is contained in , set out as a note under , Territories and Insular Possessions.section 1 of Pub. L. 94–241section 1801 of Title 48

Amendments2008—Subsec. (b). inserted “or” after semicolon at end of par. (2), redesignated par. (4) as (3), and struck out former par. (3) which read as follows: “Canton Island until the President declares by proclamation that the coastwise laws apply to Canton Island; or”.Pub. L. 110–181

children.heading: .—In General
children.label: a .—In General
children.text: Except as provided in subsection (b), the coastwise laws apply to the United States, including the island territories and possessions of the United States.

the Northern Mariana Islands, except as provided in section 502(b) of the Covenant To Establish a Commonwealth of the Northern Mariana Islands in Political Union With the United States of America ( note); or48 U.S.C. 1801
the Virgin Islands until the President declares by proclamation that the coastwise laws apply to the Virgin Islands.
